revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-7-015

A device for the transformation of electric energy.


Note: The terms step-up transformer and step-down transformer refer respectively to a transformer that is used to increase or decrease the voltage.

{{IALAFooter}}
